description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows on the upper level that allow for ample natural light. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray brick, complemented by wooden fencing and planters that add warmth and privacy to the property. The front yard includes a small lawn, a paved walkway, and a tree, while the driveway leads to an integrated garage. The upper floor has a rooftop terrace with glass railings and visible outdoor seating, providing a private outdoor space. The rear of the bungalow opens to a fenced backyard with additional greenery and a patio area. The overall structure is geometric and clean, with a focus on open, airy spaces and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story bungalow with large glass windows, light gray brick exterior, and wooden fencing, featuring a rooftop terrace and landscaped front and back yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, small lawn, tree, and a glimpse of the rooftop terrace above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upper floor's large windows, glass railings, and wooden fencing along the property boundary.
description_view_2: Rear corner view displaying the back of the garage, rooftop terrace, and planters with greenery.
description_view_3: Back view revealing the fenced backyard, patio area, and the open design of the upper terrace.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on upper floor
